name: Miss Chun Is a Litigator
overview: Chun Tumi, the daughter of a disgraced family, steps into court to defend her unjustly imprisoned father and uncovers a web of corruption. Proving her brilliance in law, she rises to become the first female litigator of her time, solving difficult cases and finding love.

trailers.title: Trailer: Miss Chun is a Litigator is Coming Soon | Miss Chun is a Litigator | 春家小姐是讼师 | iQIYI
